title: 8 Lies the World Tells a Godly Man About Strength
caption:
The world handed you a version of strength. It looks like not needing anyone, never showing emotion, leading loud, and confidence built on yourself.

Scripture has different answers for all eight of these. The humble man leads. The man who asks for help is stronger. Forgiveness is the harder road, not the weaker one. And faith doesn't remove the test — it builds the man who can pass it.

These aren't new distortions. Paul dealt with them. Christ lived the correction.

Know what you're up against.

Save this and send it to a brother who's been handed the wrong version of what a man is.

#faith #christianmen #scripture #godlymen #manofgod #strength #humility #christianity #ephesians6
